title: Nobody's Perfect Parenting Tip Sheets - Canada.ca
content:
## Nobody's Perfect Parenting Tip Sheets
This series of tips sheets offers current and accessible information to parents and caregivers of children aged 0 - 5 years on a variety of topics. The materials can be used by the general public or as supplementary resources for the NOBODY'S PERFECT program.
Download all Nobody's Perfect Parenting Tip Sheets - (PDF Version - 5,609 k)
- Behaviour: Make It Easy for Your Child to Behave Well
- Behaviour: Ways to Guide Your Child's Behaviour
- Behaviour: Make Reasonable Rules
- Behaviour: Stay Calm and Connected
- Body: Help Your Child Eat Well
- Body: Keeping Your Child Healthy
- Body: Caring for a Sick Child
- Mind: Attachment and Your Child's Feelings
- Mind: Surround Your Child with Chances to Learn
- Mind: Play Is the Way Your Child Learns
- Parents: Take Care of Yourself
- Parents: Feeling Good About Yourself
- Parents: Your Feelings after Your Baby is Born (Mom)
- Parents: Handling Stress
- Parents: Make Life Easier for Yourself
- Safety: Make Your Home Safe for Your Child
- Safety: Why Do Children Need Adults To Keep Them Safe?
- Safety: Choosing Safe Children's Products
- Safety: Everyday Safety Outdoors
- Behaviour: Understanding Your Child’s Temperament
- Body: Be Your Child’s Health Coach
- Body: Your Child’s Self-esteem
- Mind: Dad’s Role in Play
- Mind: Encouraging Literacy in Your Child
- Parents: Exploring the World Around You
- Parents: Fatherhood in Special Circumstances
- Parents: Your Feelings After Your Baby is Born (Dad)

- Brochure for Facilitators
